work is hard, unforgiving, and doesn't pay enough.

perhaps this forges an empathetic bond with this fuzzy little friend,
helping to ease a bit of our existential burden.

it helps one feel a little bit less alone.

what reverberates in the hearts and minds of fans everywhere.
